query: 品牌核心元素： 品牌标志：RAN QIU 标志 主色调：#8B3A1E（深秋棕红）、#E8DCCB（米色）、#D4A574（金棕色） 设计风格：东方美学、极简主义、自然诗意、温暖治愈   视觉语言：充足留白、浅景深、暖色调、金色时光 制作一张符合品牌调性的宣传海报。采用温暖的秋日氛围，结合品牌标志和自然元素，营造诗意而宁静的视觉体验。

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为 RAN QIU 品牌生成一张宣传海报，用于秋季品牌视觉传播。

风格/介质:东方美学海报设计，极简主义视觉语言，融合自然诗意与温暖治愈感，参考 MUJI 式留白与 Kinfolk 杂志的宁静氛围
构图:中心对称构图，大面积留白，主体置于黄金分割点，浅景深营造呼吸感
主体:RAN QIU 品牌标志作为视觉焦点，搭配秋日自然元素（落叶、麦穗或枯枝）
场景/背景:秋日户外场景，柔和的暖色调自然背景，朦胧的远景虚化
光线/氛围:金色时光（Golden Hour）侧逆光，暖橙色光晕，柔和漫射光营造宁静诗意氛围
色彩搭配:#8B3A1E（深秋棕红）作为点缀强调色，#E8DCCB（米色）作主背景底色，#D4A574（金棕色）做层次过渡，整体暖调统一
材质/纹理:自然纸张肌理，哑光质感，细腻的秋日植物纹理
文字(原文保留):"RAN QIU"
约束:品牌色必须准确呈现；留白面积不少于画面 40%；标志清晰可识别
避免:高饱和撞色、复杂装饰元素、商业感过重的排版、冷色调干扰、密集文字堆砌

Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for RAN QIU, a brand embodying Eastern aesthetics and natural poetry.

Style/medium: editorial poster design with Eastern minimalism, natural poetic sensibility, warm and healing visual language
Composition: generous negative space, shallow depth of field effect, balanced layout with brand mark as focal point
Subject: RAN QIU brand mark integrated with natural autumn elements — falling leaves, dried grasses, or gentle botanical forms
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn atmosphere, golden hour lighting, soft natural environment with poetic stillness
Lighting/mood: golden hour warmth, soft diffused light, serene and contemplative mood
Color palette: deep autumn brown-red (#8B3A1E) as anchor, warm beige (#E8DCCB) as base, golden brown (#D4A574) as accent, harmonious warm tones
Materials/textures: natural paper-like surface quality, organic botanical textures, subtle grain
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain generous white space; brand mark must remain legible; overall warmth and healing feeling required
Avoid: cluttered composition, cold color temperatures, harsh shadows, generic stock photo aesthetic, neon colors, over-saturated palettes

Use case: brand-poster
Asset type: promotional poster, vertical layout
Primary request: warm autumn atmosphere brand poster with "RAN QIU" logo and natural elements, poetic and serene visual experience
Scene/backdrop: golden hour autumn landscape, soft blurred natural background with falling leaves, abundant white space
Subject: "RAN QIU" brand logo prominently placed, surrounded by dried grasses, maple leaves, warm sunlight filtering through
Style/medium: editorial photography style, oriental aesthetics, minimalism, warm and healing visual language
Composition/framing: vertical poster format, shallow depth of field, generous negative space, logo as focal point
Lighting/mood: golden hour warm sunlight, soft diffused light, tranquil and poetic mood
Color palette: #8B3A1E deep autumn brown-red, #E8DCCB beige cream, #D4A574 golden brown, warm earth tones
Materials/textures: natural paper texture, soft fabric feel, matte finish, organic leaf textures
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must use exact hex colors #8B3A1E #E8DCCB #D4A574, keep oriental minimalist aesthetic, maintain warm autumn mood
Avoid: cold colors, cluttered composition, harsh shadows, modern geometric shapes, neon accents
